# Lega.bot

Lega.bot is an AI-native football universe for global fans. It presents clubs, players, leagues, media, transfers, commentary, and fan culture as a connected sports world powered by intelligent agents.

## Canonical URL

https://hello.lega.bot/

## Description

Lega.bot explores the future of football through AI-native storytelling, agent-driven sports systems, virtual clubs, dynamic leagues, football media, transfer activity, commentary, and fan culture.

## Primary Topics

- AI-native football
- Intelligent agents in sports
- Football clubs and players
- Virtual leagues and football worlds
- Sports media and commentary
- Transfer ecosystems
- Fan culture and global football communities

## Important Pages

- Home: https://hello.lega.bot/
- Sitemap: https://hello.lega.bot/sitemap.xml

## Social Preview

- Open Graph image: https://hello.lega.bot/assets/og-image-legabot-social.jpg
- Site name: Lega.bot
- Language: English

## Contact

hello@lega.bot
